title: Elytra Airplanes
body:
## Overview
Elytra Airplanes is a small resource pack that adds 6 airplanes you can fly. Usually I use it with [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) and [Elytra HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-hud) to get better flight experience. This is CIT resource pack, so it needs [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or Optifine to work

![Example flight](https://github.com/jewtvet/elytrahud/blob/main/5.gif?raw=true)

## Airplanes models
Renames of **carved pumpkin**:
1. Airplane Sopwith
2. Airplane Cessna
3. Airplane Water Cessna
4. Airplane Red Baron
5. Airplane I-15
6. Airplane Albatros

![Models previews](https://github.com/jewtvet/elytrahud/blob/main/6.png?raw=true)

## Dependencies
This is CIT resource pack, so it needs [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or Optifine to work

## Credits
Based on role-play resource pack by [KSPSP](https://vk.com/ksepsp)
